deploy.dbQuestion: Does your website need to <bold>store data</bold>?
deploy.noStorageDesc: Display-only sites like portfolios, blogs, and landing pages
deploy.needStorageDesc: Sites that need to remember user input like sign-ups, posts, and likes
deploy.githubQuestion: Would you like to <bold>store and manage</bold> your code online?
deploy.githubBenefit: If you plan to edit code later or collaborate with others, uploading to GitHub is recommended.
deploy.githubSkipNote: You can skip this if you just want a quick deploy.
deploy.enterTokens: Sign up for the services below and enter your tokens.
deploy.vercelDesc: A service that hosts your website on the internet.
deploy.vercelStep1: Sign up at vercel.com (you can use your GitHub account)
deploy.vercelStep3: Click "Create Token" → any name, set expiration to "No Expiration"
deploy.vercelStep4: Copy the token (it's only shown once, make sure to copy!)
deploy.supabaseDesc: A service that stores your data like user info and content.
deploy.supabaseStep1: Sign up at supabase.com (you can use your GitHub account)
deploy.supabaseStep3: Click "Generate new token" → any name, set Expires in to "Never"
deploy.githubDesc: A service for storing and managing your code online.
deploy.githubStep3: Enter "teammaker" for Note, set Expiration to "No expiration"
deploy.githubStep5: Copy the token (it's only shown once, make sure to copy!)

settings.modelDesc: Select the Claude model for agents

settings.testModeDesc: Create agents with mock data without calling Claude API
settings.dataConfirm: All agents and conversations will be deleted.
settings.modelHaikuDesc: When you want to build quickly
settings.modelSonnetDesc: When you want quality at a good price

settings.githubTokenDesc: Required to push code to GitHub
settings.githubTokenHint: Must start with ghp_ or github_pat_

landing.heroTitle: Build Your AI Team with a Single Chat
landing.heroSubtitle: Create AI agents, assign tasks, and deploy results — all through natural language. No coding required.
landing.featuresSubheading: Build services through conversation, no complex development required.
landing.featureChatDesc: Just tell the manager AI what you want via chat. It configures agents and distributes tasks automatically.
landing.featureTeamDesc: Agents with roles like planner, developer, and designer collaborate to produce results together.
landing.featureOfficeDesc: Watch your agents work in real-time inside a charming pixel art office environment.
landing.featureDeployDesc: Deploy your completed website to Vercel instantly. No complicated setup needed.
landing.featureAutoDesc: When errors occur, AI automatically detects and fixes them. No more debugging headaches.
landing.featureI18nDesc: Supports Korean and English. Easy to use for everyone.
landing.step1Desc: Just enter your Anthropic API key and you're ready to go. No sign-up required.
landing.step2Desc: Use natural language like "Build me a shopping mall" or "Create a portfolio site".
landing.step3Desc: The manager distributes tasks, and each agent produces results according to their role.
landing.step4Desc: Preview the completed code, and if you like it, deploy to the internet with one click.
landing.ctaSubtitle: No coding experience needed. Your AI team will build it for you.

systemCheck.title: System Requirements
systemCheck.description: The following tools are required to build and run projects.
systemCheck.restartNote: You may need to restart the app after installation.
systemCheck.restartRequired: TeamMaker needs to restart to apply the new PATH.
